Container.Name: GyroidVault
Container.Overview: GyroidVault is a modern, self-hosted 3D model library and print management platform. Organize your STL, 3MF, and Gcode files, track your print history, and manage your projects in a beautiful dashboard.
Container.Changes:
### v1.3.4 (2026-06-13) ### What's New
* Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): You can now assign users the role of Admin (full access), Uploader (can upload and manage their own models), or Viewer. Viewers have a clean, read-only experience where all edit/delete/upload buttons are automatically hidden. Note: The very first user on your instance (User ID 1) is automatically upgraded to Admin to ensure you're never locked out. All other existing users will default to the 'Uploader' role, meaning they won't lose any of their current upload permissions!
* Bulk Selection & Tagging (Flat Grid): You can now manage your models much faster in the Flat Grid view! Simply use Ctrl+Click (or Shift+Click) to select multiple models at once, Thanks to @MFA-G ### Bug Fixes * Nested Folder Collages: Fixed an issue where the new 2x2 folder collages were not rendering correctly for folders nested deep inside other directories. #30 * API Security: Enforced strict ownership checks across the board. Uploaders can now only modify, edit, or delete models that they have personally uploaded.
### v1.3.3 (2026-06-09) * 1-Click Slicer Opening: You can now set a "Preferred Slicer" in your User Profile (choose between OrcaSlicer, Elegoo Slicer, or Ultimaker Cura). Once set, the "Open in Slicer" button will directly open the file in your favorite slicer. (The other slicers remain available via a small dropdown arrow). * Dynamic Folder Collages: When browsing your Library in Folder View, folders will now automatically generate a 2x2 image collage based on the thumbnails of the files they contain! As requested in #19 Bug Fixes * Elegoo Slicer Fix: Resolved a critical issue where sending files to Elegoo Slicer via the web interface would result in a "The file does not contain any geometry data" error. Slicer URLs have been fully refactored to ensure maximum compatibility. #25 * Version Checker: Fixed a bug where the update checker would sometimes falsely report that a new version was available when running on the latest Docker image. #26
### v1.3.2 (2026-06-06) Fixed a bug on fresh Docker/HTTP installations where the System, SMTP, and Users tabs would get stuck loading due to the browser silently rejecting the login cookies.
### v1.3.1 (2026-06-04) Fixed a bug where fresh installations couldn't register the first admin account.
### v1.3.0 (2026-06-03) This release brings highly requested features for better privacy, user management, and project organization, alongside a massive security overhaul under the hood to keep your data safe!
**What's new:** - **Private Instance Mode:** Lock down your entire GyroidVault instance. Unauthenticated visitors are forced to a full-screen login page. - **Registration Control:** Disable open registration to ensure only you can manually invite/create users. - **Documentation Support:** Upload `.pdf`, `.txt`, and `.md` files directly to your models! Documents are neatly separated into a dedicated "Documentation" tab. - **Private Collections:** Collections (Projects) can now be set to "Private", hiding them from normal users.
**Security Hardening:** - Migrated to secure, `HttpOnly` cookies to protect against XSS. - Implemented a double-submit CSRF token system. - Added strict rate-limiting to prevent brute-force login attacks. - Integrated Helmet.js to enforce modern HTTP security policies. ### v1.2.2 (2026-05-28) - Minor bug fixes and stability improvements.
### v1.2.1 (2026-05-28) - Minor bug fixes and stability improvements.
### v1.2.0 (2026-05-25) - **Improved Slicer Support:** Better integration with your favorite slicers. - **3MF Previews:** Added 3MF preview support across all views in the application.
### v1.1.1 (2026-05-25) This is a quick maintenance update bringing several quality of life improvements to the Folder View and resolving some slicer integration bugs!
**What's new:** - **Folder View UI upgrades:** Added an item counter ("Showing X Folders / Y Files") at the top of the folder view. - **Folder View 3D Previews:** You can now click directly on a 3D model inside the folder view to launch an interactive 3D preview without needing to leave the page. - **Per-file Thumbnails:** Gcode and Image files now display their own unique thumbnail inside the Folder View, rather than all files inheriting the main model thumbnail. - **ARM64 Support:** The official Docker image now natively supports Raspberry Pi and Apple Silicon processors.
**Fixes:** - Fixed a bug where clicking "Open in Slicer" for Bambu Studio and OrcaSlicer would result in a download error or a blank page due to spaces in file paths.
### v1.1.0 (2026-05-23) This update brings a highly requested Folder View mode and fixes several annoying bugs under the hood.
**What's new:** - **Folder View:** You can now browse your library exactly as it exists on your disk. Enable this via System Settings.
**Fixes:** - **Persistent navigation:** Clicking the back button from a model page now correctly remembers your current page and active filters. - **Scanner performance:** Adjusted the background scanner so it no longer freezes the web UI when processing massive libraries (e.g. 2TB+). - Custom categories created in the settings now show up in menus immediately, without needing a container restart. - Fixed a small visual bug that sometimes caused the 'Open in Slicer' dropdown menu to disappear when hovering over it.
Container.Description: Self-hosted 3D model library and print management platform.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port for the GyroidVault web interface.

Config.Name: 3D Models Library
Config.Description: Path to your 3D models and prints library.

Config.Name: Library Path (Internal)
Config.Description: Internal container path for the library. Must match the 3D Models Library Target path.
